item.name: Root of Maya
item.description:
A variety of eel which keeps to the darker depths of the Font of Maya.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This wavekin's thin, long body pierces Thavnair's waters like the roots of its well-adapted trees. A useful disguise─but not so useful that man has not learned how delicious it tastes when grilled on a skewer above an open flame.
